tech_news.title: Microsoft April 2026 Patch Tuesday fixes 167 flaws, 2 zero-days - BleepingComputer
tech_news.description: Today is Microsoft's April 2026 Patch Tuesday with security updates for 167 flaws, including 2 zero-day vulnerabilities.

tech_news.title: Apple TV users get $2/month Peacock, as bundle expands to new places - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Apple TV lets subscribers add Peacock Premium for just $2/month, and now a similar bundle offer has just launched through Prime Video.

tech_news.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.

tech_news.title: Google’s Spotlight-like desktop search bar for Windows is available for everyone - The Verge
tech_news.description: Last year, Google announced that it was testing a Google desktop app for Windows that resembles macOS’s Spotlight feature, and now the app is available globally in English.
